articles.title: Rajasthan Weather Update: Heatwave Conditions to Persist, Light Rain Possible in Some Areas - Sangri Today
articles.full_text:
Heat conditions and heat waves in the region of Rajasthan are anticipated to persist for the next two weeks. IMD has predicted extended weather conditions, where maximum temperatures of between 44 and 47 degrees Centigrade are possible for most of the districts of Rajasthan. The rainfall in the state will also be less than the average levels.
According to the Jaipur Meteorological Center prediction for 22nd May to 4th June, dry conditions will prevail across most parts of the state. However, due to western disturbance on 22nd and 23rd May, there could be rains, drizzles, thunderstorm, and gusty winds in parts of northwest and north Rajasthan. Wind velocity can rise up to 40 to 50 km/h.
According to the Meteorological Department, rainfall activity across the state is expected to be below normal in the next two weeks. Light drizzle is possible in some parts of southeastern Rajasthan in the second week, while the rest of the state will remain dry.
The department has also issued a warning of a persistent heatwave in most districts. Severe heatwave conditions are possible in some areas between May 24 and 27. Maximum temperatures are expected to be 3 to 5 degrees Celsius above normal in the first week, while they may remain 1 to 3 degrees above normal in the second week.
Night temperatures are also not expected to provide significant relief. Minimum temperatures are also expected to remain 2 to 4 degrees above normal. According to Meteorological Department data, Rajasthan received 88 percent less rainfall than normal between May 15 and 21. During this period, the state received only 0.3 mm of rainfall, while the normal average is considered to be 2.7 mm.
According to meteorologists, the western disturbance and upper air cyclonic circulation over northern Pakistan and Punjab remain in effect, but their impact in Rajasthan is likely to be limited.

articles.title: Rajasthan braces for severe heatwave after brief weather relief - newsdrum.in
articles.full_text:
Jaipur, May 22 (PTI) Weather remained largely dry across Rajasthan during the past 24 hours, with heatwave and warm night conditions recorded at isolated places, the Meteorological Department said on Friday.
Sri Ganganagar recorded the highest maximum temperature in the state at 45.1 degrees Celsius during 24 hour period ending Friday morning, while Sirohi registered the lowest minimum temperature at 20 degrees Celsius.
According to the Met office, most parts of the state are likely to witness mainly dry weather over the next week.
However, under the influence of a fresh western disturbance, northwestern and northern Rajasthan may witness thunderstorm activity, light rainfall, and gusty winds with speeds of 40-50 kmph during the afternoon hours of May 22 and 23.
The department said temperatures could dip by 1-2 degrees Celsius in some areas over the next 48 hours due to strong dust-laden winds blowing at speeds of 20-30 kmph.
From May 24 onwards, temperatures are expected to rise again by 2-3 degrees Celsius with heatwave to severe heatwave likely at isolated places in the state. PTI SDA MDO MDO

articles.title: जयपुर राजस्थान में दो दिन तेज अंधड़ के साथ बारिश का अलर्ट जारी, तेज गर्मी से राहत मिलने की संभावना - firstindianews
articles.search_term: ("हीट एक्शन प्लान" OR "गर्मी से राहत" OR चेतावनी OR "रेड अलर्ट" OR "ऑरेंज अलर्ट" OR "येलो अलर्ट" OR एडवाइजरी OR "राहत सामग्री" OR "राहत शिविर" OR मुआवजा) Rajasthan
articles.full_text:
जयपुर : राजस्थान में दो दिन तेज अंधड़ के साथ बारिश का अलर्ट जारी किया है. प्रदेशवासियों को 2 सप्ताह से पड़ रही तेज गर्मी से राहत मिलने की संभावना है. मौसम विभाग के अनुसार कल प्रदेश में नया पश्चिमी विक्षोभ सक्रिय हुआ है.
जिसके असर से आज और कल तेज आंधी के साथ बारिश की संभावना है. मौसम विभाग ने झुंझुनूं, चूरू, हनुमानगढ़ और श्रीगंगानगर में लू के साथ आंधी और बारिश का अलर्ट जारी किया है.
इससे बाकी शहरों के तापमान में एक से दो डिग्री की राहत मिल सकती है. वहीं आज अलवर, भरतपुर, दौसा, डीग, धौलपुर, करौली, बीकानेर, खैरथल-तिजारा, कोटपूतली-बहरोड और फलौदी में लू की चेतावनी जारी की है.
प्रदेश में दो दिन तेज अंधड़ के साथ बारिश का अलर्ट जारी
-प्रदेशवासियों को 2 सप्ताह से पड़ रही तेज गर्मी से राहत मिलने की संभावना
-मौसम विभाग के अनुसार कल प्रदेश में नया पश्चिमी विक्षोभ हुआ सक्रिय

-श्रीगंगानगर में लू के साथ आंधी और बारिश का अलर्ट किया जारी
-इससे बाकी शहरों के तापमान में मिल सकती है एक से दो डिग्री की राहत
